policy: No source, no number. KPI values stay blank until the active export, API, or query is connected.

metrics.label: Visits
metrics.nextAction: Connect an analytics export/API before reporting visits.

metrics.label: Opt-ins
metrics.dailyMetric: Daily verified email or lead-capture opt-ins
metrics.requiredSource: Active capture source or newsletter provider export
metrics.nextAction: Connect the active capture source or newsletter provider export before reporting opt-ins.

metrics.label: Calls
metrics.requiredSource: Calendly API/export or completed-call calendar query
metrics.nextAction: Connect Calendly API/export or define the calendar query used to identify completed fit calls.

metrics.label: Bookings
metrics.nextAction: Connect Calendly API/export before reporting booked calls.

metrics.label: Invoices
metrics.dailyMetric: Daily invoice count after choosing open invoices or sent invoices
metrics.requiredSource: Invoice export or API plus metric definition
metrics.nextAction: Connect invoice export/API and choose whether open invoices or sent invoices is the daily metric.

metrics.label: Sales
metrics.dailyMetric: Daily verified closed sales reconciled to pipeline
metrics.requiredSource: Payment export/API plus closed-won pipeline rows
metrics.nextAction: Connect payment exports/APIs and reconcile them to closed-won pipeline rows before reporting sales.
